game_info.title: Make_some_blocks_passable
game_info.concept: Mobile: Players engage in a first-person shooter experience across competitive multiplayer modes or Battle Royale, controlling a soldier via on-screen virtual joysticks and buttons for movement, aiming, and abilities. Matches are objective-based, earning players XP and currency for performance, which fuels progression through account and weapon leveling to unlock new gear and attachments.
game_info.description: Battle Zone is a top-down tactical shooter where you control an elite soldier navigating a dangerous battlefield. Eliminate enemy soldiers while avoiding their fire and collecting ammo. Complete the mission by eliminating all enemies or reaching the extraction point. Watch your health and ammunition - tactical positioning and smart resource management are key to victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your soldier in four directions
Z: Fire weapon
SPACE: Sprint (faster movement with reduced accuracy)
SHIFT: Take cover/crouch (reduced movement speed but improved accuracy)
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game after victory or defeat
game_info.automated_testing:
<TEST_1>
<test_description>Tests basic game functionality and responsiveness by simulating random player inputs to verify error-free gameplay.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Alternates between movement keys, shooting, sprinting, and taking cover in semi-random patterns to exercise core game mechanics.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Game runs without errors while responding appropriately to all simulated inputs, demonstrating that all core gameplay systems function correctly.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_1>

<TEST_2>
<test_description>Tests winning condition by implementing an optimal strategy to complete the mission.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Methodically eliminates enemies while prioritizing health preservation, ammo collection, and strategic positioning to reach the extraction point.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player successfully eliminates required enemies or reaches the extraction point, triggering the win condition.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_2>

<TEST_3>
<test_description>Tests player damage and health system to verify combat mechanics function properly.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Deliberately exposes player to enemy fire at intervals while testing healing mechanics through health pack collection.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Player health decreases when hit by enemies and increases when collecting health packs, with game over triggered at zero health.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_3>

<TEST_4>
<test_description>Tests ammunition system and reload mechanics to verify resource management.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Continuously fires weapon to deplete ammo, then collects ammo pickups to test replenishment while monitoring ammo count.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Ammo decreases when firing, prevents shooting when empty, and successfully replenishes when collecting ammo pickups.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_4>

<TEST_5>
<test_description>Tests enemy AI behavior and pathfinding to verify combat challenge.</test_description>
<strategy_description>Positions player to observe enemy movement patterns, attack behaviors, and response to player actions.</strategy_description>
<expected_outcome>Enemies successfully track player, take cover, and engage in combat without getting stuck or exhibiting erratic behavior.</expected_outcome>
</TEST_5>
